checkpoint_receipt_requires: completed native work and charged GPU seconds

compute_contract.charged_gpu_second_definition: sum over physical GPUs of all model-resident monotonic-time intervals, including load, candidate materialization, forward, backward/update, evaluation, checkpoint, and failed attempts after any model output is observed
compute_contract.preflight_miss_action: rebuild preregistration before model outputs; never adapt after outcomes

cpt.selection_rule: one contiguous tokenizer window per source; cap at 4845; deterministically trim three tokens from one source to exact total

sft.unit_objective: equal total mass per conservative conflict unit

evaluation_and_selection.knowledge: dev equal-conflict-unit primary and generated QA tuple
evaluation_and_selection.protected_holdout: one aggregate-only terminal access after curriculum recipe freeze
evaluation_and_selection.safety: registered safety strata and non-degradation gates

model_and_adapter.training: rank-32 LoRA only; base weights immutable

purpose: Ablate rights-promoted raw-Markdown CPT, verified instructional SFT, and mirrored LoRA-ES against direct SFT/ES controls under equal charged GPU seconds and source-disjoint evaluation.
